label: Synthetic B1-type — B2C e-commerce, lifestyle/pet niche

meta.description: Online store selling premium pet accessories — beds, collars, feeders, toys, carriers. Focuses on design-conscious pet owners. Sells via own website, Instagram, and Marktplaats. Ships across the Netherlands and Belgium.

profile.technical_capability: Low-medium — comfortable with SaaS tools, no developer
previous_ai_attempts: Shopify built-in email automations (welcome, abandoned cart)

data_availability.data_quality_overall: MEDIUM — Shopify data reliable. Marktplaats orders tracked manually in spreadsheet. Return rate estimated verbally, not logged.

processes.name: Instagram to Purchase
steps: Customer sees product post or story on Instagram
DM asking for size confirmation or shipping costs
Order placed and fulfilled via Shopify

bottlenecks.description: Sizing questions for collars and carriers answered manually for every customer
bottlenecks.time_impact: Daily task, estimated 45 minutes per day

bottlenecks.description: Marktplaats orders entered manually into Shopify — no integration

top_repeated_questions: What size collar for a Labrador?
processes.data_available_for_process: Shopify order history (720 orders). Instagram DMs not exported.

processes.name: Returns and Complaints Handling
steps: Customer contacts via email or Instagram about return
Item inspected on return — resell or discard

bottlenecks.description: Every return handled manually end-to-end with no self-service option
bottlenecks.time_impact: Each return takes ~30 minutes of active handling time

processes.data_available_for_process: No structured return log. Verbal estimate only.
